name: abs-norm
description: Custom Audiobookshelf metadata provider for Norm Macdonald Live

scripts.lint: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/app.js && node --check src/metadata.js && node --check src/dataset.js && node --check scripts/scrape-nml.js
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:smoke
